vulnerabilities.title: LLM01:2025 - Prompt Injection
vulnerabilities.description: Prompt injection attacks manipulate AI models through crafted inputs to bypass safety controls and extract sensitive information or generate harmful content.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Input validation, output filtering, and prompt sanitization

vulnerabilities.title: LLM02:2025 - Sensitive Information Disclosure
vulnerabilities.description: AI systems may inadvertently reveal sensitive training data, user information, or system prompts through their responses.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Data anonymization, output filtering, and privacy-preserving training

vulnerabilities.title: LLM03:2025 - Supply Chain Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Vulnerabilities in AI model dependencies, training data pipelines, and third-party integrations can compromise system security.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Dependency scanning, supply chain auditing, and secure development practices

vulnerabilities.title: LLM04:2025 - Data and Model Poisoning
vulnerabilities.description: Attackers can manipulate training data or model parameters to create backdoors or biased outputs.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Data validation, anomaly detection, and model integrity verification

vulnerabilities.title: CVE-2025-0129 - NVIDIA NeMo Path Traversal
vulnerabilities.description: Path traversal vulnerability in NVIDIA NeMo generative AI framework allowing code execution and data tampering.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Update to latest NeMo version, implement input validation

regulations.title: EU AI Act Implementation
regulations.description: European Union AI Act becomes enforceable, requiring compliance for high-risk AI systems including security assessments and transparency requirements.

regulations.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
regulations.description: NIST releases comprehensive AI risk management framework with specific security controls and governance requirements.

regulations.title: California AI Regulations
regulations.description: California implements new AI regulations requiring transparency, bias testing, and security measures for AI systems.

market_trends.title: AI Security Market Growth
market_trends.description: AI security market grows to $15.2 billion, driven by enterprise adoption and regulatory requirements.

market_trends.title: LLM Security Tools Adoption
market_trends.description: 85% of enterprises implement LLM security tools, with focus on prompt injection protection and data privacy.

market_trends.title: AI Security Talent Shortage
market_trends.description: Demand for AI security professionals increases by 200%, creating significant talent shortage in the market.

research_papers.title: Adversarial Attacks on Large Language Models: Survey and Defense
research_papers.abstract: Comprehensive survey of adversarial attacks on LLMs and proposed defense mechanisms including input validation and output filtering.

research_papers.title: Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning: Techniques and Applications
research_papers.abstract: Analysis of privacy-preserving techniques in ML systems including differential privacy and federated learning.

research_papers.title: AI System Security: A Comprehensive Framework
research_papers.abstract: Proposed comprehensive framework for AI system security covering development, deployment, and operational phases.

industry_reports.title: McKinsey AI Security Report
industry_reports.description: Comprehensive analysis of AI security challenges and opportunities in enterprise environments.

industry_reports.title: Gartner AI Security Magic Quadrant
industry_reports.description: Evaluation of AI security vendors and solutions with market positioning and capabilities assessment.

industry_reports.title: Forrester AI Security Wave
industry_reports.description: Analysis of AI security market trends and vendor capabilities with strategic recommendations.

vulnerabilities.title: LLM05:2026 - Excessive Agency
vulnerabilities.description: AI systems granted excessive autonomy can take unintended actions or be manipulated for malicious purposes.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Principle of least privilege, human oversight, and action validation

vulnerabilities.title: LLM06:2026 - System Prompt Leakage
vulnerabilities.description: System prompts and instructions can be extracted through carefully crafted queries or adversarial attacks.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Prompt encryption, access controls, and output monitoring

vulnerabilities.title: LLM07:2026 - Vector Database Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Vector databases used in RAG systems can be compromised through injection attacks or unauthorized access.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Database encryption, access controls, and query validation

vulnerabilities.title: CVE-2026-0456 - OpenAI API Token Leakage
vulnerabilities.description: Vulnerability in OpenAI API implementation allowing token leakage and unauthorized access.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Update API libraries, implement token rotation

vulnerabilities.title: CVE-2026-0789 - Hugging Face Model Injection
vulnerabilities.description: Model injection vulnerability in Hugging Face model repository allowing malicious model distribution.
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Model validation, signature verification, update security protocols

regulations.title: US Federal AI Executive Order Implementation
regulations.description: US federal government implements comprehensive AI security requirements for all federal agencies and contractors.

regulations.title: UK AI Act
regulations.description: United Kingdom implements comprehensive AI regulation with specific security and safety requirements.

regulations.title: AI Security Standards ISO/IEC 27090
regulations.description: International standard for AI security management systems published with comprehensive controls and guidelines.

market_trends.description: AI security market grows to $25 billion with enterprise adoption and regulatory compliance driving growth.

market_trends.description: 90% of enterprises implement AI security automation tools for continuous monitoring and threat detection.

market_trends.title: AI Security Insurance Market Growth
market_trends.description: AI security insurance market grows to $3 billion as companies seek protection against AI-related risks.

research_papers.abstract: Analysis of quantum computing threats to AI systems and proposed quantum-resistant security measures.

research_papers.abstract: Comprehensive analysis of security challenges in federated learning systems and proposed solutions.

research_papers.title: AI System Auditing: Framework and Best Practices
research_papers.abstract: Proposed framework for comprehensive AI system auditing covering security, privacy, and fairness.
